data.text:
Committed. Changes in `cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/BeadForm.svelte`:

- `inputClass`: `text-sm` → `text-body-sm`
- `labelClass`: `text-xs font-medium` → `font-label-caps text-label-caps uppercase` (uppercase field labels)
- Status `<select>`: replaced inline `style="background-color: var(--status-{status}-surface);..."` with `statusBadgeClass(status)` returning the existing `badge-status-*` Tailwind utility (matches the pattern used in `routes/nodes/[nodeId]/beads/+page.svelte`)
- Cancel/Submit buttons: `text-sm` → `text-body-sm`
